title: DecisionRecord
description: Redacted, stable outcome + evidence digests (ADR-0016 §3): the audit/stats/report artifact. Findings carry no field capable of holding a raw fact value — redacted by construction, not by convention (OQ-8/OQ-9).

obligation.description: Present only for an obligation-proving rule's finding; absent for a non-obligation effect (ADR-0017 §2).

effect.description: require-review is satisfied only by forge-proven ApprovalEvidence (ADR-0017 §3), never a bare vouch.

code.description: Stable finding code, echoing the proving rule's onFailure.code; correlated across DecisionRecord/PresentationModel.

toolDigest.description: Content digest of the evaluating tool build (OQ-9 replayability).

mergeResultDigest.description: Evaluated merge-result digest (ADR-0017 §1). Null only when the forge capability to compute/pin it is absent, and then only alongside capabilityGap — never a silent widening of what was actually pinned.

capabilityGap.description: Present only when mergeResultDigest is null; documents which forge capability was absent (e.g. no merge-train/queue, ADR-0017 §1). Never present when mergeResultDigest was actually pinned.

factsResolvedAt.description: Keyed by provider name (ADR-0011 amendment, hermetic replay).
